deviceIssue:
The Apple Iphone 13 mobile was presented to us after an impact and liquid
incursion incident.
The phone is not staying on and reboots for the customer then shuts down.
The device is unusable for the user in its current condition.
Further inspection needed.
diagnosisIssues:
We completed a damage inspection to the device.
Power meter readings show irregular values and random restarts, indicating that the
mainboard power management controller (SMC) is faulty, leading to power failures
caused by liquid damage impact. Critical mainboard fault on phone.
repairRecommendation:
REPLACEMENT RECOMMENDED:
Based on the extensive damage from the liquid damage to the device including the
primary mainboard, this iPhone 13 is considered Beyond Economical Repair.

deviceIssue:
The Apple iPhone was presented to us after an impact damage incident.
The back glass is shattered and the phone is restarting every few minutes.
Further inspection needed.
diagnosisIssues:
After inspection on the phone we can determine the mainboard has suffered a serious
fault due the impact damage, forcing the phone to restart every two to three minutes.
While on power, used mainboard readings which give us unstable power readings and
voltage going to 0.00 when phone restarts.
repairRecommendation:
REPLACEMENT RECOMMENDED:
Based on the extent of the damage which affects not only the back glass but also the
mainboard, this iPhone is considered Beyond Economical Repair.
Any repair attempt would be unlikely to restore the device to the reliability or
performance standards expected under manufacturer specifications.

deviceIssue:
The Apple Iphone 16 Pro mobile was presented to us after an impact damage
incident. Car Crash incident.
The phone has incurred significant physical damage with cracks in the rear of the
phone and the frame is bent.
The device is unusable for the user in its current condition.
Further inspection needed.
diagnosisIssues:
Physical damage to phone that is not repairable / replaceable
Power meter readings show irregular values and random restarts, indicating that the
mainboard power management controller (SMC) is faulty, leading to power failures
caused by impact.
repairRecommendation:
REPLACEMENT RECOMMENDED:
Based on the extensive damage to the device including the primary mainboard, this
iPhone Pro is considered Beyond Economical Repair.

deviceModel: DJI Mavic 3 Classic with Fly More Combo
deviceIssue:
The DJI Mavic 3 Classic drone was presented to us after a crash with a broken motor
arm.
The drone is not usable based on the current condition.
diagnosisIssues:
MAINBOARD DAMAGED DEVICE
Upon inspection, the motor controllers (ESC Board) has failed to perform in
some of our tests indicating erratic signals which lead to a motor speed
failure/unprecise rotation.
Drone self check shows errors as motor idle or drifting. Trying to fly this drone
might pose a risk of failure during flight causing the drone to collapse and fall
from the sky.
repairRecommendation:
BEYOND ECONOMIC REPAIR: Replacement device recommended
Based on the damage found not only at the arm but also on the mainboard controllers
any attempt of repairing this drone is a potential risk (failing while flying), repair this
drone is not recommended and won't guarantee reliability performance as expected by
manufacturer specifications.

deviceIssue:
The Apple Macbook Air was presented to us after an impact damage incident.
The front LCD is shattered and the computer is unusable to the customer.
Further inspection needed.
diagnosisIssues:
After inspecting the MacBook, we determined that the mainboard has sustained
damage due to impact. The mainboard overheats and the fan runs at maximum speed.
During our tests, the macbook showed unstable readings and restarted during tests due
to overheating.
repairRecommendation:
REPLACEMENT RECOMMENDED:
Based on the damage to the LCD screen and the mainboard’s failure preventing the
computer from staying on, this MacBook is considered Beyond Economical Repair.
Any repair attempt would be unlikely to restore the device to the reliability or
performance standards expected under manufacturer specifications.

deviceModel: DJI Mavic 4 Pro with Fly More Combo
deviceIssue:
The DJI Mavic 4 Pro drone was presented to us after liquid exposure.
The drone landed in the water and now multiple error messages are showing
up.
The drone is not usable for the user and due health and safety, liquid damage
drones are not repairable due potential risk of faulting during flight.
diagnosisIssues:
LIQUID DAMAGED DEVICE
Upon inspection, it was found that the liquid indicator had turned red at the
mainboard controllers. Indicating crucial components have been exposed to
liquid.
repairRecommendation:
BEYOND ECONOMIC REPAIR: Replacement device recommended
Due to the nature of the damage and the potential risk (failing while flying), any
attempts of repair on the drone is not recommended and won't guarantee reliability
performance as expected by manufacturer specifications.
